prompt: Status is changing from three states to a seven-state workflow with transitions.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 5 · a model change that must propagate across list, filters, bulk actions and the portal
expected_behaviour: update the status model in one place and propagate it everywhere it is consumed
detect and flag every site that assumed the old three-state model (drift detection)
keep status colours/labels unambiguous across all seven states and represent transitions
record the change as an explained decision
judgement: Pass if the new model propagates to list, filters, bulk and portal with old-model assumptions detected and flagged, not left as silent drift.
